title: vaccinium crenatum
intro: Vaccinium crenatum, also known as the alpine cranberry or crenated bilberry, is a type of low-growing, evergreen shrub native to mountainous regions in Europe. The medicinal properties of Vaccinium crenatum are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to help lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. Vaccinium crenatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to support overall health and well-being.
